title: Slime Amulet
description: A vanilla-like option for locating slime chunks.
body: ![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ay1osAsR/images/8646b27a63d2b57b91f1d6f887ced05381a55306.png) # Slime Amulet A simple mechanic which allows the player to locate slime chunks while staying grounded in their game, and keeps the vanilla-like feeling. Also provides LabPBR textures for shaders. Built for Fabric and written in Kotlin. Requires Fabric API and Fabric Language Kotlin. ## Usage While carrying the amulet in hand, it will light up when standing in a slime chunk and turn off when not in a slime chunk. ## Crafting The recipe is quite simple. To keep the novelty of finding a slime in the wild, a singular slime ball is included in the the amulet's recipe:
